overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting movement through a flooded urban amusement park at night. The camera moves slowly through deep water alongside a roller coaster structure, passing a concrete building to reveal an illuminated city skyline with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded promenade between building and roller coaster

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through deep flood water alongside a concrete building wall

entered.detail: tall dark concrete structure forming the right boundary of the path
metal support structure with vertical poles and curved tracks silhouetted against the sky
distant urban buildings with scattered lights visible on the horizon
flooded urban area with rippling water reflecting the dim ambient light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through deep flood water alongside a massive concrete building wall on the right. The roller coaster framework looms ahead and to the left, while a distant city skyline is visible under a dark night sky. The water ripples gently as the camera advances steadily forward through the narrow flooded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded waterfront with amusement park structure

events.description: camera rounds the corner of the building, opening up the view to the city skyline
large illuminated digital billboard becomes visible on the distant buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing through flood water while turning right to face the open cityscape and roller coaster

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the building corner into a wide open flooded area, revealing more of the roller coaster structure and the illuminated city skyline ahead. A bright digital billboard becomes visible on the right side of the distant buildings. The roller coaster framework now dominates the left side of the frame as the camera continues moving through the water toward the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a flooded urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide vista of a glowing city skyline. It begins by gliding through deep, rippling water alongside a massive concrete wall, with the skeletal framework of a roller coaster looming ahead to the left. As the camera rounds the corner of the building, the narrow passage expands into a vast flooded area, shifting the perspective to reveal the full scale of the amusement park structures. The scene then opens further to showcase the illuminated city skyline in the distance, where a bright digital billboard emerges among the buildings. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance through the water, with the roller coaster framework dominating the left side of the frame as it draws closer to the urban lights.
